expression.expression:
CASE
  WHEN oin.refund_amount_usd > 0
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END

CAST(CASE
  WHEN severity_score >= 70
    THEN 'Critical refund leak - review product quality or returns policy'
  WHEN severity_score >= 40
    THEN 'Elevated refund rate - investigate customer feedback'
  WHEN severity_score >= 20
    THEN 'Monitor refund trends'
  ELSE NULL
END AS STRING)

CASE
  WHEN COALESCE(ocs.cross_sell_items, 0) > 0
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END

CAST(CASE
  WHEN severity_score >= 70
    THEN 'Investigate bundle and cross-sell strategy - weak attachment'
  WHEN severity_score >= 40
    THEN 'Review product pricing or promotion strategy'
  WHEN severity_score >= 20
    THEN 'Monitor basket metrics for trends'
  ELSE NULL
END AS STRING)

SUM(CASE
  WHEN oi.is_primary_item = 0
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END)

CASE
  WHEN items_sold_first_30d < 5
    THEN 0.0
  ELSE LEAST(
    100.0, 
    GREATEST(
      0.0, 
      COALESCE(first_30d_refund_rate, 0.0)
      * 150.0
      + CASE
          WHEN lifetime_refund_rate IS NOT NULL
          AND first_30d_refund_rate IS NOT NULL
          AND lifetime_refund_rate > first_30d_refund_rate
            THEN (lifetime_refund_rate - first_30d_refund_rate) * 200.0
          ELSE 0.0
        END))
END

CASE
  WHEN items_sold < 5
    THEN 0.0
  ELSE LEAST(100.0, GREATEST(0.0, refund_value_share * 200.0 + refunded_item_rate * 100.0))
END

CASE
  WHEN oin.refund_amount_usd > 0
    THEN 1
  ELSE 0
END

CASE
  WHEN pda.total_gross_revenue > 0
    THEN pda.total_refund_value / pda.total_gross_revenue
  ELSE 0.0
END

CASE
  WHEN pda.items_sold > 0
    THEN CAST(pda.items_refunded AS DOUBLE) / pda.items_sold
  ELSE 0.0
END

CASE
  WHEN pda.orders > 0
    THEN CAST(pda.orders_with_cross_sell AS DOUBLE) / pda.orders
  ELSE 0.0
END

CASE
  WHEN pda.orders > 0
    THEN pda.total_revenue / pda.orders
  ELSE NULL
END

CASE
  WHEN pda.orders > 0
    THEN CAST(pda.total_items AS DOUBLE) / pda.orders
  ELSE NULL
END

CAST(CASE
  WHEN severity_score >= 70
    THEN 'Launch excitement did not translate to durable quality - investigate product issues'
  WHEN severity_score >= 40
    THEN 'Elevated post-launch refunds - review customer expectations vs reality'
  WHEN severity_score >= 20
    THEN 'Monitor launch quality metrics'
  ELSE NULL
END AS STRING)

CASE
  WHEN orders < 5
    THEN 0.0
  ELSE LEAST(
    100.0, 
    GREATEST(
      0.0, 
      (1.0 - bundle_attachment_rate)
      * 40.0
      + CASE
          WHEN average_items_per_order < 1.5
            THEN 30.0
          ELSE 0.0
        END
      + CASE
          WHEN average_order_value_usd < 50.0
            THEN 30.0
          ELSE 0.0
        END))
END

CASE
  WHEN items_sold_first_30d > 0
    THEN CAST(refunds_first_30d AS DOUBLE) / items_sold_first_30d
  ELSE NULL
END

CASE
  WHEN items_sold_lifetime > 0
    THEN CAST(refunds_lifetime AS DOUBLE) / items_sold_lifetime
  ELSE NULL
END
